pr_description:
* Update all project dependencies to their latest versions
* Migrate the project from cjs to esm
* Migrate from jest to vitest
* Migrate from older node and typescript to the latest versions, refactor deprecated use cases
* Add type safety to the CLI flags
* Update apple fallback data with latest Apple HIG specs
commit_message:
feat(core): migrate project to esm and modernize deps

BREAKING CHANGE: esm migration is a breaking change for module use of the lib.

Added jpg extension in addition to jpeg as an output type

commit_message:

commit_message:
feat(main): added dark mode support for iOS

Generate iOS splash screen meta with (prefers-color-scheme: dark) media attr  [default: false]

BREAKING CHANGE: generateImages method from the module API now returns HTMLMeta object with the
chunks of HTML content, instead of one big HTML string

fix #51

pr_description:
Upgraded to pptr v2 to limit number of total running instances to 1. Optimized chrome launcher flags
to fix the connection error issues.

fix #62 fix #58
commit_message:
feat(main): upgraded to pptr v2 and optimized chrome launcher

Upgraded to pptr v2 to limit number of total running instances to 1. Optimized chrome launcher flags
to fix the connection error issues.

fix #62 fix #58

fix(main): revert --disable-dev-shm-usage chrome launch arg

Revert Chrome's --disable-dev-shm-usage launch arg that prevents npx commands fail on linux systems

fix #631

feat(file): add maskable keyword to the manifest icons' file name

As both maskable and non-maskable icons can be built and defined for the same app, there should be a
distinction on the icon file name depending on maskable option usage.

BREAKING CHANGE: The file name template of the manifest icons is updated.

fix #679

fix(main): add both 'any' and 'maskable' icons to manifest by default

Chrome and Lighthouse audits expect both icons with any and maskable purposes to be present in the
manifest file.

BREAKING CHANGE: In addition to 2 icons with `maskable` purpose in the manifest file, 2 more icon
entries of the same icons with `any` purpose is added to the manifest output.

fix #725
